They ran out of fuel before takeoff

questions.q: Which Japanese general led the military occupation forces in Hawaii during the immediate aftermath of the attack?
choices: No occupation forces were deployed; Hawaii remained under U.S. control

choices: All cruisers escaped with minimal damage

questions.q: What natural geographic feature of Pearl Harbor contributed to its later selection as a major U.S. military base?
